channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: B-52 on test flight plunged at nearly a mile a minute before crashing, killing 8
item.description: Limited tracking data shows that the B-52 involved in a deadly crash during a test flight at an Air Force base in California made a sharp right and then nearly completed a 180-degree turn before plunging to the ground at nearly a mile a minute.

item.title: FBI disrupts a planned attack on the White House UFC cage-fighting show, court papers say
Republican Gov. Mike DeWine wants Ohio to abolish the death penalty, saying it is not a deterrent
